---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Contact

Feel free to reach out to me through any of the following:

[{{< fa brands linkedin size=2x >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-mullins-176006319/){target="_blank"}

[{{< fa brands github size=2x >}} GitHub](https://github.com/robert-mullins){target="_blank"}

[{{< fa envelope size=2x >}} robertdavmullins@gmail.com](mailto:robertdavmullins@gmail.com){target="_blank"}

## References

Available upon request.
